item.title: The Interrogation That Revealed His Motive
item.description: Following the 2018 Toronto van attack, Alek Minassian was questioned by investigators in a widely analyzed interrogation. The interview provided insight into his planning, online influences, and stated motivations, becoming a key part of the criminal proceedings that led to multiple convictions and a life sentence.

media:content.media:title: The Interrogation That Revealed His Motive
media:content.media:description: Following the 2018 Toronto van attack, Alek Minassian was questioned by investigators in a widely analyzed interrogation. The interview provided insight into his planning, online influences, and stated motivations, becoming a key part of the criminal proceedings that led to multiple convictions and a life sentence.

item.title: What Really Happened To Brittany Murphy?
item.description: Brittany Murphy died unexpectedly in December 2009 at the age of 32. The official investigation concluded that her death resulted from pneumonia, anemia, and multiple prescription medications, but the circumstances and the death of her husband months later have continued to fuel public interest and speculation for years.

media:content.media:title: What Really Happened To Brittany Murphy?
media:content.media:description: Brittany Murphy died unexpectedly in December 2009 at the age of 32. The official investigation concluded that her death resulted from pneumonia, anemia, and multiple prescription medications, but the circumstances and the death of her husband months later have continued to fuel public interest and speculation for years.

item.title: Is Sandra Melgar Responsible For What Happened?
item.description: Sandra Melgar was convicted in connection with the 2012 death of her husband, Jaime Melgar, after investigators challenged her account of a home invasion. The case has remained controversial, with supporters questioning aspects of the evidence while prosecutors maintain the conviction was supported by the facts presented at trial.

media:content.media:title: Is Sandra Melgar Responsible For What Happened?
media:content.media:description: Sandra Melgar was convicted in connection with the 2012 death of her husband, Jaime Melgar, after investigators challenged her account of a home invasion. The case has remained controversial, with supporters questioning aspects of the evidence while prosecutors maintain the conviction was supported by the facts presented at trial.

item.title: The Vacation That Ended In A Lasting Mystery
item.description: Natalee Holloway disappeared during a graduation trip to Aruba in 2005, sparking an international search and years of investigation. In 2023, Joran van der Sloot admitted to killing Holloway as part of a plea agreement in an unrelated extortion case, bringing a measure of resolution after nearly two decades of unanswered questions.

media:content.media:title: The Vacation That Ended In A Lasting Mystery
media:content.media:description: Natalee Holloway disappeared during a graduation trip to Aruba in 2005, sparking an international search and years of investigation. In 2023, Joran van der Sloot admitted to killing Holloway as part of a plea agreement in an unrelated extortion case, bringing a measure of resolution after nearly two decades of unanswered questions.

item.title: The Wellness Influencer Who Built A Lie
item.description: Belle Gibson gained a massive following by claiming she had cured terminal cancer through natural therapies. Investigations later revealed those claims were false, leading to widespread public backlash, legal action, and lasting questions about misinformation in the wellness industry.

media:content.media:title: The Wellness Influencer Who Built A Lie
media:content.media:description: Belle Gibson gained a massive following by claiming she had cured terminal cancer through natural therapies. Investigations later revealed those claims were false, leading to widespread public backlash, legal action, and lasting questions about misinformation in the wellness industry.

item.title: A Family Secret Led To A Shocking Investigation
item.description: In 2020, interior designer Jade Janks became the focus of a high profile California investigation after her stepfather, Thomas Merriman, was found dead. Prosecutors argued that Janks acted after discovering thousands of inappropriate photographs of herself on his computer. She was convicted in 2024, bringing the closely watched case to a conclusion.

media:content.media:title: A Family Secret Led To A Shocking Investigation
media:content.media:description: In 2020, interior designer Jade Janks became the focus of a high profile California investigation after her stepfather, Thomas Merriman, was found dead. Prosecutors argued that Janks acted after discovering thousands of inappropriate photographs of herself on his computer. She was convicted in 2024, bringing the closely watched case to a conclusion.

item.title: The Case That Changed The Debate Around Dissociative Identity Disorder
item.description: Billy Milligan became the first person in the United States to be found not guilty by reason of insanity after his defense argued he had dissociative identity disorder. His case sparked decades of debate among mental health professionals, legal experts, and the public over criminal responsibility, psychiatric diagnoses, and the justice system.

media:content.media:title: The Case That Changed The Debate Around Dissociative Identity Disorder
media:content.media:description: Billy Milligan became the first person in the United States to be found not guilty by reason of insanity after his defense argued he had dissociative identity disorder. His case sparked decades of debate among mental health professionals, legal experts, and the public over criminal responsibility, psychiatric diagnoses, and the justice system.
